_comment: Per-repo path-list consumed by /to-tickets AFK-fit checklist (#642). Adding a new repo MUST NOT require editing any SKILL.md — only this file. Paths are gitignore-style globs evaluated against an issue's declared-changed file list; an intersection ⇒ AFK-no ⇒ slice does NOT receive the `sandcastle` label and routes via interactive /implement. For jarvis the list mirrors docs/security/agent-boundaries.md (canonical Tier-2 surface) — sync manually when that file changes; a future task may automate. For redrobot the list captures the safety-critical zones called out in jarvis CLAUDE.md (driver/, planning/, mujoco/).
